{"parts":[{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","content":{"stdout":"usage: pulse.py [-h]
                {start,status,stop,resume,tick,finalize,launch,retry,validate}
                ...

Pulse Build Orchestration

positional arguments:
  {start,status,stop,resume,tick,finalize,launch,retry,validate}
    start               Begin automated orchestration
    status              Show current build status
    stop                Gracefully stop orchestration
    resume              Resume a stopped build
    tick                Run single orchestration cycle (for scheduled tasks)
    finalize            Run post-build finalization (safety, tests, learnings)
    launch              Print launcher path and paste-prompt contents
    retry               Reset a failed/bad Drop and re-edit its brief
    validate            Validate plan completeness before start

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
